items.title: Package scripts cannot fake green gates
risk: A package gate can print success without reading files or running a validator.
mustFailWhen: A check, scan check, verify, test, or build check script is empty or only runs echo success, echo ok, exit 0, or true.

items.title: Covered matrix entries require real tests
risk: A risk item can be marked covered without a test file or source evidence.
mustFailWhen: A covered matrix item has no coveredByTests entry, points at a missing test file, lacks sourceFiles, or references a missing source file.

items.title: CI green is not release ready
risk: A GitHub Actions pass can be reported as release readiness without separate release and runtime evidence.
mustFailWhen: Handover or verification evidence implies CI passed means release ready, or omits the separate GitHub Actions and verify:release light states.

items.title: Runtime acceptance is separate from local green
risk: Local governance checks can be mistaken for API, browser, database, or manual acceptance evidence.
mustFailWhen: Verification or handover omits runtime acceptance state, infers acceptance from npm run check, or fails to name API, browser, DB, or manual evidence.

items.title: beforeSalesOrder blocks runtime bypass
risk: Sales-order runtime files, routes, SQL, menus, permissions, or bypass-capable RuoYi roots can be created before the gate opens.
mustFailWhen: A change creates sales-order runtime artifacts while beforeSalesOrder is blocked.

items.title: High-risk permissions must close to real sources
risk: High-risk permission coverage can drift from real API, permission, or registry sources.
mustFailWhen: A required high-risk customer fund API is missing required coverage, permission metadata, or source closure.

items.title: Validation SQL must depend on real owned tables
risk: Validation SQL can include stale table checks or customer checks for platform-owned tables.
mustFailWhen: Customer validation SQL reintroduces idempotent_request or references a table that is not generated in the database scan.

items.title: UI graph screens must come from real source files
risk: The UI graph can become green with fake screens or empty file paths.
mustFailWhen: graph/ui-graph.json contains a screen with an empty file path or a source file that does not exist.

items.title: API graph must carry permission source
risk: API graph entries can be treated as covered without permission metadata from real source.
mustFailWhen: An API graph entry that requires permission governance lacks a permission field or points at missing source.

items.title: Forbidden edit roots override allowed edit roots
risk: A forbidden runtime path can be allowed by a broader allowedEditRoots entry.
mustFailWhen: Boundary checks permit a changed file under forbiddenEditRoots because the same path is also under allowedEditRoots.

items.title: RuoYi business permissions map to feature ownership
risk: RuoYi business:<feature>:<action> permissions can drift away from feature ownership.
mustFailWhen: A scanned RuoYi business permission lacks a feature mapping or maps to the wrong feature owner.

items.title: Rule objects require explicit preflight identity
risk: A rule object can be added without explicit preflight identity and ownership evidence.
mustFailWhen: A rule object lacks required identity, source contract, owned file, test, ownership, or change-record references.
